Default config list (used by self-play / simulate)

Source: R/mxo_self_play.R
mxo_config_default.Rd

Default config list (used by self-play / simulate)

Usage

mxo_config_default(
  n = 4L,
  d_spatial = 3L,
  k = 3L,
  ply_cap = 60L,
  max_timelines = 32L
)

Arguments

n, d_spatial, k, ply_cap, max_timelines

Game-config parameters, see mxo_new_game().

Value

A configuration list.

On this page
